abilities.name: Black Blood
abilities.description: All characters without Black Blood within 1 yard suffer 1 damage when this character suffers damage.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.description: Immune to falling damage. May ignore terrain and other characters when moving.

abilities.name: Thirst for Blood
abilities.description: Gains Fast Condition when Living character within 3 yards killed by friendly character.

abilities.name: Mature
abilities.description: If kills Living non-Nephilim Enforcer/Henchman/Master rank or Fated with y attack, may feast to become Mature Nephilim. All damage/Conditions removed.

actions: (1) Talons (Pugilism) | AV: 6M (12M) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/5 damage. Ram Blood Frenzy: After damaging, take action again vs same target. Mask Toss Away: Push target 4 yards. Mask Feed Brood: Push corpse 4 yards, Terror Tots count as killing for Grow.
system.notes: Grown from Terror Tots after consuming blood. Sudden violent growth process. Ravenous appetite. Hunt in packs of 2-3. Trigger growth through feasting.
